images.prompt: A raw, ultra-realistic 8k photograph of a stunningly beautiful young Japanese female model exuding a top-tier gravure idol aesthetic, captured on a skyscraper observation deck overlooking a sprawling neon city. She offers a gentle, soft smile to the camera, radiating a zen and peaceful atmosphere, as if sharing a secret moment with the viewer. Shot on Sony A7R IV, 85mm f/1.4 GM lens, depth of field, ray tracing, global illumination.8k photo, Large breasts
